name: The Junkyard
short_description: Explore a network of tunnels that lead to several different rooms. There are various creatures to frighten and hinder you, which grow stronger and more numerous. Defeat bosses and experience the dramatic and mysterious plot of the life of Joseph
detailed_description:
The Void of the Hallways

Wake up outside your Shelter, where you have lived your entire life, and discover an ancient network of tunnels that connected several Shelters. Abandoned and empty, bizarre and carnivorous creatures have proliferated in the tunnel network amid piles of trash and rust.

Key Features:

  • Survive: Beware the creatures of the underground junkyard, they are very dangerous and carnivorous. If your life meter reaches zero, start all over again...

  • Items: Collect items from around the map. Manage them and create more items through your inventory.

  • Weapons: Find firearms and melee weapons scattered around the map. There are four different firearms.

  • Battles: Get ready to defeat frantic and bizarre bosses in crazy battles. Each boss has its own unique look and abilities.

  • Choices: Here, the choices are yours: choose your start, choose your order of battle and choose your end... But don't worry, because nothing will alter your character's reality.

  • Story: Although you choose how this story is told, the reality of Joseph, the main character, is only one and it's up to you to discover the truth.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil
